content.text:
<user_query>
Search the frontend/src directory for any CSS, SCSS, or styled-component files related to:
1. Hero section styling
2. Landing page styling
3. Any file containing class names like "hero", "landing", "meet-biqc"

Return the full file paths found.
</user_query>
Let me search the frontend/src directory for CSS, SCSS, styled-component files related to hero sections, landing pages, and specific class names.

Here are all the files found in `frontend/src` related to hero sections, landing pages, and the requested class names:

---

**CSS files with hero/landing styling:**

1. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\App.css` — Contains `.hero-section`, `.hero-bg`, and `.feature-card` (landing feature cards) class definitions.
2. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\mobile.css` — Contains extensive mobile-responsive overrides for `[data-testid="hero-section"]`, `.hero-content`, `.hero-background-canvas`, `[data-testid="hero-viewport"]`, `[data-testid="hero-cta"]`, hero arrows, etc.

**JS/JSX component files with hero/landing references:**

3. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\components\website\LiquidSteelHeroRotator.js` — Dedicated hero rotator component.
4. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\Landing.js` — Main landing page.
5. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\LandingIntelligent.js` — Alternate/intelligent landing page variant.
6. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\website\TrustLandingPage.js` — Trust-themed landing page.
7. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\website\HomePage.js` — Homepage (likely renders the hero).
8. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\website\IntelligencePage.js` — Intelligence page with hero references.
9. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\website\IntegrationsPage.js` — Integrations page with hero references.
10. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\website\PlatformPage.js` — Platform page with hero references.
11. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\website\PricingPage.js` — Pricing page with hero references.
12. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\TrustPage.js` — Trust page with hero/landing references.
13. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\BlogPage.js` — Blog page with hero references.
14. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\MarketingAutomationPage.js` — Marketing page with hero references.
15. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\RevenuePage.js` — Revenue page with hero references.
16. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\OperationsPage.js` — Operations page with hero references.
17. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\AILearningGuarantee.js` — AI Learning page with hero references.
18. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\Integrations.js` — Integrations page with hero references.
19. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\EnterpriseTerms.js` — Enterprise terms page with hero references.
20. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\pages\Dashboard.js` — Dashboard with landing/hero references.
21. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\components\FirstTimeOnboarding.js` — Onboarding component with hero/landing references.
22. `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\frontend\src\App.js` — Root app file with landing route references.

---

**No matches found** for the class name `meet-biqc` anywhere in the `frontend/src` directory. No SCSS/SASS files exist in this project -- it uses plain CSS (`App.css`, `mobile.css`, `index.css`, `enforcement.css`) plus Tailwind utility classes and inline styles within the JS/JSX components.
